item.berlords_food_system.emetic.tooltip: Empties your stomach. Eternal foods stay put.
Empties your stomach completely — even eternal foods.
item.berlords_food_system.stomach_extens: Permanently grows your stomach by one food slot (up to %s).
Your stomach cannot stretch any further.
Your stomach grumbles and grows — %s slots!
item.berlords_food_system.eternal_season: Combine with any food in a crafting grid. The seasoned food never leaves your stomach.
item.berlords_food_system.lunchbox.usage: Use: eat into empty stomach slots. Sneak + use: pack food from your inventory.
item.berlords_food_system.lunchbox.nothi: No food in your inventory to pack.
item.berlords_food_system.lunchbox.canno: Lunchbox is empty or your stomach is full.
